name: io.github.sergii-ziborov/weavatrix-refactor
description: The refactoring layer of Weavatrix: hash-verified, always-reversible edit plans.

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the initial local Git repository

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_ALLOW_SOURCE_EDITS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to authorize apply_edit_plan and rollback to write source files; unset, the refactor tools stay preview-only

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_REFACTOR_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Optional directory for the rollback snapshot store; defaults to a per-repo location

environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_PRECISION
environmentVariables.description: Core semantic precision: lsp (default) or off
